ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apparel_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparel item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the apparel item */,
  "variation" TEXT /* Variation of the item (e.g., Chestnut, Mustard) */,
  "diy" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the item can be DIY (Do It Yourself) */,
  "buy_price" INTEGER /* Price to buy the item in the game */,
  "sell_price" INTEGER /* Price to sell the item in the game */,
  "color_1" TEXT /* Primary color of the item */,
  "color_2" TEXT /* Secondary color of the item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the item (e.g., 1x1) */,
  "miles_price" REAL /* Price in miles (in-game currency) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the item (e.g., Able Sisters) */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the source of the item */,
  "seasonal_availability" TEXT /* Seasonal availability of the item */,
  "mannequin_piece" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the item is a mannequin piece */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the item (e.g., Cute) */,
  "label_themes" TEXT /* Label themes associated with the item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., HeadCap) */,
  "villager_equippable" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the item can be equipped by villagers */,
  "catalog" TEXT /* Catalog listing status of the item */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the item's image or model */,
  "internal_id" INTEGER /* Internal ID of the item */,
  "unique_entry_id" TEXT /* Unique entry ID of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the item */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the item given by players */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the item */,
  "is_limited_edition" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the item is a limited edition */,
  "is_pre_order" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the item is available for pre-order */,
  "pre_order_start_date" TEXT /* Date when pre-order starts */,
  "pre_order_end_date" TEXT /* Date when pre-order ends */,
  "special_requirements" TEXT /* Any special requirements or notes for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_items_catalog FOREIGN KEY ("catalog") REFERENCES catalog_listings ("catalog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_items_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES item_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_items_style FOREIGN KEY ("style") REFERENCES item_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_items_seasonal_availability FOREIGN KEY ("seasonal_availability") REFERENCES seasonal_availability ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_items_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Able Sisters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the source */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the source's website */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the source is an official vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the variation belongs to */,
  "variation_name" TEXT /* Name of the variation (e.g., Chestnut) */,
  "color_1" TEXT /* Primary color of the variation */,
  "color_2" TEXT /* Secondary color of the variation */,
  "variation_description" TEXT /* Description of the variation */,
  "is_exclusive" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the variation is exclusive to a specific event or season */,
  "exclusive_event" TEXT /* Name of the event or season for which the variation is exclusive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_variations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES apparel_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label theme */,
  "label_theme" TEXT /* Name of the label theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label theme */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the label theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal availability */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., All Year, Summer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the seasonal availability */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the seasonal availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalog_listings" (
  "catalog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalog listing */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item listed in the catalog */,
  "catalog_name" TEXT /* Name of the catalog (e.g., For sale, Not for sale) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the catalog */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the item is featured in the catalog */,
  "featured_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was featured */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount for the item in the catalog */,
  "discount_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "discount_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "transaction_price" INTEGER /* Price of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction took place (e.g., in-game shop, NPC) */,
  "npc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NPC involved in the transaction (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES apparel_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount of in-game currency spent by the player */,
  "total_earned" REAL /* Total amount of in-game currency earned by the player */,
  "favorite_items" TEXT /* List of favorite items (comma-separated item IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)
